name: NEUTRON
subtitle: Paraphonic Semi-Modular Synthesizer
summary: Paraphonic semi-modular synthesizer built around two CEM3340-based analog oscillators, a self-oscillating 12 dB/oct multimode VCF, dual ADSR generators, BBD analog delay, overdrive, noise, LFO, sample-and-hold, and a comprehensive patchbay with 32 inputs and 24 outputs. Internally normalled for immediate play; fully reroutable via patch cables.
